hero.label: Real Estate Marketing Transformation
hero.headline: Campaign assets and settlement gifting, handled in one brief.
hero.subtext: Digital staging, campaign video tour content and settlement artwork gifting for Melbourne real estate agents.

tiers.name: Staging Only
tiers.bestFor: Best for stronger stills and vendor presentation visuals
tiers.description: Artwork digitally integrated into supplied listing images for campaign use.
includes: Artwork direction selected for the property
Digital staging into supplied listing images

tiers.name: Staging + Tour
tiers.bestFor: Best for staged visuals plus digital video content
tiers.luxury: Quoted to scope before work begins
tiers.description: Staged campaign imagery plus a polished digital video tour for campaign use.
includes: Digital video tour using the staged direction
Video content ready for campaign use

tiers.name: Staging + Tour + Print
tiers.bestFor: Best for campaign assets plus buyer gifting
tiers.luxury: Quoted to scope before work begins
tiers.description: Campaign assets plus physical prints dispatched ready for settlement.
includes: Physical prints dispatched ready for buyer gifting

pricing.deluxe: Any package can be upgraded to archival giclée prints, professionally framed and delivered ready to hang. Quoted per campaign.
pricing.paymentNote: Ongoing agent accounts — for agents who use the service regularly — are eligible for 30-day invoicing. One-off campaigns are quoted and confirmed before work begins.

inkOriginals.heading: Ink Originals
inkOriginals.subheading: For prestige listings that need something beyond a print.
inkOriginals.body: Select works are available as hand-drawn ink reproductions — each rendered by hand from the original composition using fineliners and gel pens. No two are identical. These are original works, suited to prestige campaigns where the artwork needs to feel as considered as the home itself.

process.heading: From campaign asset to buyer gift.
process.body: The artwork used in the listing campaign is the artwork the buyer can receive at settlement. They see it in the marketing, imagine it in the home, then keep it as part of the handover.

about.heading: A complete marketing transformation service.
about.subheading: Built for agents who need listings to feel considered without managing three separate vendors.
about.body: The Full Picture brings digital staging, video tour content and settlement gifting into one service. The art is original and selected around the property, but the outcome is practical: a stronger listing presentation, faster campaign assets, clearer differentiation from other agents, stronger buyer connection, no physical staging costs, and a gift that keeps the agent in the room after settlement.
